# openshift_install_config (Resource)

Generates an install-config.yaml for OpenShift bare metal IPI/UPI deployment.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_vip` (String)
- `base_domain` (String)
- `cluster_name` (String)
- `ingress_vip` (String)
- `machine_network_cidr` (String)
- `output_dir` (String) Directory where install-config.yaml will be written.
- `pull_secret` (String, Sensitive)
- `ssh_key` (String)

### Optional

- `additional_trust_bundle` (String) PEM-encoded CA certificate bundle for disconnected registries.
- `baremetal_hosts` (Attributes List) Bare metal host definitions for IPI. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--baremetal_hosts))
- `cluster_network_cidr` (String)
- `control_plane_replicas` (Number) Number of control plane replicas.
- `disconnected_registries` (Attributes List) Mirror registry entries for disconnected installations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--disconnected_registries))
- `image_content_sources` (Attributes List) imageContentSources entries for mirrored images. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--image_content_sources))
- `network_type` (String) Network plugin type.
- `ocp_version` (String) OpenShift version to deploy (e.g. 4.14). Used for compatibility checks.
- `proxy` (Attributes) Proxy configuration for the cluster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proxy))
- `service_network_cidr` (String)
- `worker_replicas` (Number) Number of worker replicas.

### Read-Only

- `rendered` (String, Sensitive) The rendered install-config.yaml content.

<a id="nestedatt--baremetal_hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `baremetal_hosts`

Required:

- `bmc_address` (String)
- `bmc_password` (String, Sensitive)
- `bmc_username` (String)
- `boot_mac_address` (String)
- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `online` (Boolean)
- `root_device_hints` (Map of String)


<a id="nestedatt--disconnected_registries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disconnected_registries`

Required:

- `mirror_source` (String)
- `prefix` (String)

Optional:

- `mirror_by_digest_only` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--image_content_sources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `image_content_sources`

Required:

- `mirrors` (List of String)
- `source` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--proxy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `proxy`

Optional:

- `http_proxy` (String)
- `https_proxy` (String)
- `no_proxy` (String)
